commit_scope: Add a bounded Adam bias-correction floor.

commands: coord claim adam-bias-correction-floor "Next model-kernel wall after adam-step-cell: add bounded fixed-point Adam bias-correction receipts over existing moment cells; avoid tensor autodiff, live mesh transport, durable eval query, payload merkle proof, privacy/conflict, router/audio, and BML compiler lanes."

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/autodiff-gradient.fk form-stdlib/tests/adam-step-cell-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/adam-bias-correction-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh adam-step-cell adam-bias-correction
local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `core.fk+model-vitality.fk+optimizer-step.fk+autodiff-gradient.fk+adam-step-cell-band.fk+adam-bias-correction-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY adam-step-cell` and `PASS-4WAY adam-bias-correction`.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-native model kernels now have bounded Adam bias-corrected moment and weight update receipts.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/autodiff-gradient.fk form-stdlib/tests/adam-step-cell-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/adam-bias-correction-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh adam-step-cell adam-bias-correction

phase_gate.gate: Bias-corrected optimizer receipts must exist before training-loop and model-layer claims can treat Adam optimizer state as first-class Form-native model-kernel status.
phase_gate.next: Add tensor autodiff gradient cells, live chunk payload merkle proof, mesh transport, durable eval query, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Bounded Adam first/second moment cells existed, while production Adam bias correction remained a named next wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: adam-bias-correction returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
not_claimed: chunk-range payload merkle proof over a live carrier
